title: equisetum limosum var. fluviatile
intro: Equisetum limosum var. fluviatile, also known as river horsetail, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which have been found to help alleviate conditions such as urinary tract infections and kidney stones. The plant has been found to have health benefits, including reducing blood pressure and improving circulation, due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Equisetum limosum var. fluviatile can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support urinary health and promote overall well-being.
